title: helichrysum brownei
intro: Helichrysum brownei, also known as Island Helichrysum or Browne's Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the islands of Hawaii and is valued for its medicinal and therapeutic properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant contains compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it beneficial for various health issues, including skin conditions, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. Helichrysum brownei can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate pain.
